title: bredemeyera secunda
intro: Bredemeyera secunda is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the orange bush or sour orange. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Bredemeyera secunda include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage. Bredemeyera secunda is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
